name: Necronomicon
description: Notes A tome that lets Priests Inflict Curse for 4 seconds. Although its usage is nullified in the presence of a Mystic, the damage can compensate Priest’s overall lack of DPS throughout early and mid-game dungeons.
effects: Heal: 140 (+1.36 per WIS over 76) HP Shot Effect: Curse for 4 seconds Hitbox Size: 2 tiles Shots hit multiple targets
